flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Trinity Bible College and Graduate School rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.7k → $19.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Trinity Bible College and Graduate School rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($17.7k → $19.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Trinity Bible College and Graduate School fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Trinity Bible College and Graduate School rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 (32.4% → 38.7%).
